testcase.name: test_metrics_contains_required_series

failure.message:
AssertionError: missing sample line for sentinel_stream_first_token_seconds_bucket assert None + where None = <built-in method search of re.Pattern object at 0xad4ed1b2baa0>('# HELP python_gc_objects_collected_total Objects collected during gc
# TYPE python_gc_objects_collected_total counter
python_gc_objects_collected_total{generation="0"} 1938.0
python_gc_objects_collected_total{generation="1"} 967.0
python_gc_objects_collected_total{generation="2"} 96.0
# HELP python_gc_objects_uncollectable_total Uncollectable objects found during GC
# TYPE python_gc_objects_uncollectable_total counter
python_gc_objects_uncollectable_total{generation="0"} 0.0
python_gc_objects_uncollectable_total{generation="1"} 0.0
python_gc_objects_uncollectable_total{generation="2"} 0.0
# HELP python_gc_collections_total Number of times this generation was collected
# TYPE python_gc_collections_total counter
python_gc_collections_total{generation="0"} 643.0
python_gc_collections_total{generation="1"} 58.0
python_gc_collections_total{generation="2"} 5.0
# HELP python_info Python platform information
# TYPE python_info gauge
python_info{implementation="CPython",major="3",minor="11",patchlevel="15",version="3.11.15"} 1.0
# HELP process_virtual_memory_bytes Virtual memory size in bytes.
# TYPE process_virtual_memory_bytes gauge
process_virtual_memory_bytes 2.06...fallback_total 0.0
# HELP sentinel_stream_fallback_created Streaming chat requests that fell back to pseudo-stream after a real-stream error
# TYPE sentinel_stream_fallback_created gauge
sentinel_stream_fallback_created 1.777504642705677e+09
# HELP sentinel_stream_first_token_seconds Wall-clock seconds from stream_answer entry to the first emitted chunk
# TYPE sentinel_stream_first_token_seconds histogram
# HELP sentinel_chat_decision_total Chat requests by access decision
# TYPE sentinel_chat_decision_total counter
sentinel_chat_decision_total{decision="partial"} 1.0
# HELP sentinel_chat_decision_created Chat requests by access decision
# TYPE sentinel_chat_decision_created gauge
sentinel_chat_decision_created{decision="partial"} 1.777504656596835e+09
# HELP sentinel_guardrail_triggered_total Number of chat queries that matched a sensitive-pattern guardrail
# TYPE sentinel_guardrail_triggered_total counter
sentinel_guardrail_triggered_total 0.0
# HELP sentinel_guardrail_triggered_created Number of chat queries that matched a sensitive-pattern guardrail
# TYPE sentinel_guardrail_triggered_created gauge
sentinel_guardrail_triggered_created 1.7775046427057052e+09
') + where <built-in method search of re.Pattern object at 0xad4ed1b2baa0> = re.compile('^sentinel_stream_first_token_seconds_bucket(\{[^}]*\})?\s+[0-9.eE+-]+$', re.MULTILINE).search

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_sentinelrag_v4.py:132: in test_metrics_contains_required_series assert pattern.search(body), f"missing sample line for {name}" E AssertionError: missing sample line for sentinel_stream_first_token_seconds_bucket E assert None E + where None = <built-in method search of re.Pattern object at 0xad4ed1b2baa0>('# HELP python_gc_objects_collected_total Objects collected during gc
# TYPE python_gc_objects_collected_total counter
python_gc_objects_collected_total{generation="0"} 1938.0
python_gc_objects_collected_total{generation="1"} 967.0
python_gc_objects_collected_total{generation="2"} 96.0
# HELP python_gc_objects_uncollectable_total Uncollectable objects found during GC
# TYPE python_gc_objects_uncollectable_total counter
python_gc_objects_uncollectable_total{generation="0"} 0.0
python_gc_objects_uncollectable_total{generation="1"} 0.0
python_gc_objects_uncollectable_total{generation="2"} 0.0
# HELP python_gc_collections_total Number of times this generation was collected
# TYPE python_gc_collections_total counter
python_gc_collections_total{generation="0"} 643.0
python_gc_collections_total{generation="1"} 58.0
python_gc_collections_total{generation="2"} 5.0
# HELP python_info Python platform information
# TYPE python_info gauge
python_info{implementation="CPython",major="3",minor="11",patchlevel="15",version="3.11.15"} 1.0
# HELP process_virtual_memory_bytes Virtual memory size in bytes.
# TYPE process_virtual_memory_bytes gauge
process_virtual_memory_bytes 2.06...fallback_total 0.0
# HELP sentinel_stream_fallback_created Streaming chat requests that fell back to pseudo-stream after a real-stream error
# TYPE sentinel_stream_fallback_created gauge
sentinel_stream_fallback_created 1.777504642705677e+09
# HELP sentinel_stream_first_token_seconds Wall-clock seconds from stream_answer entry to the first emitted chunk
# TYPE sentinel_stream_first_token_seconds histogram
# HELP sentinel_chat_decision_total Chat requests by access decision
# TYPE sentinel_chat_decision_total counter
sentinel_chat_decision_total{decision="partial"} 1.0
# HELP sentinel_chat_decision_created Chat requests by access decision
# TYPE sentinel_chat_decision_created gauge
sentinel_chat_decision_created{decision="partial"} 1.777504656596835e+09
# HELP sentinel_guardrail_triggered_total Number of chat queries that matched a sensitive-pattern guardrail
# TYPE sentinel_guardrail_triggered_total counter
sentinel_guardrail_triggered_total 0.0
# HELP sentinel_guardrail_triggered_created Number of chat queries that matched a sensitive-pattern guardrail
# TYPE sentinel_guardrail_triggered_created gauge
sentinel_guardrail_triggered_created 1.7775046427057052e+09
') E + where <built-in method search of re.Pattern object at 0xad4ed1b2baa0> = re.compile('^sentinel_stream_first_token_seconds_bucket(\{[^}]*\})?\s+[0-9.eE+-]+$', re.MULTILINE).search
